action.reasoning: Observation: Improved global heuristic (utility/(graph_dist+1) + BFS next-hop) achieved perfect local proxy (success=1.0, explored=1.0 on 6 train maps) but full harness eval crashed with UnboundLocalError on success_rate (variables not initialized on error paths or when parsing eval_config.json/maps_eval). Prior myopic baseline only 0.0196 score. Analysis: Code lacked per-episode try/except, default metrics, robust eval_config handling, and per_type success-only distance calc; heuristic itself is solid frontier-based planner compatible with real ExplorationEnv (0 params, respects all rules). Decision: Overwrite predict.py with clean robust version (always-defined metrics, per-map exception handling, exact JSON contract, proxy score print, 2-map local fallback), minor train.py update, run quick train+local test, then submit_eval on fixed checkpoint to obtain official exploration_score and measure full-eval time.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
